title: hieracium angustatum subsp. nitens
intro: Hieracium angustatum subsp. nitens, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium angustatum subsp. nitens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
